prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan G15 (1.5L inline-4, original to the Skyline Sport) with a custom billet crankshaft from Tomei, forged pistons by JE (8.5:1 compression ratio), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM reliability. Pair with a custom camshaft profile from Jun Auto (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) and a dual-spring valve setup from Tomei to handle 8,500 RPM redline.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C30-94 supercharger (8 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup using a PWR front-mount core and custom 3-inch aluminum piping by HKS. Fueling upgrades include a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with a custom tune by RS Enthalpy.

Suspension overhaul with a custom coilover setup by Tein (EDFC-compatible) using Type-HG dampers, Swift springs (300 lb/in front, 250 lb/in rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro. Chassis reinforcement includes a Cusco 4-point strut bar and a custom rear subframe brace by Garage Defend.
estetica: Full custom bodywork by RAUH-Welt Begriff (RWB) in the 'Pandem' widebody style, retaining the original Skyline Sport's rounded fenders but with aggressive overfenders, custom front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler in carbon fiber (hand-laid by Seibon).

Custom interior retrim by Status Racing with diamond-stitched black Alcantara, red contrast stitching, and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) on a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges replaced with a Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR) in a custom aluminum dash panel.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella Evo X projectors with custom LED halos (red) and a full LED taillight conversion using OEM-style housings from Depo Racing. Wheels are Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear).
